mapper.sql: ID, InvoiceNo, CaseNo, OrderNo, CustomerNo, ModelNo, Quantity, TransType, ImpDate, OptCode, ExpDesc, BarCode, Username, Opttime, OptRecord, PalletNo, Price, ext_orderno, ext_order_item, taxPrice, Amount, TaxAmount, TaxRate, FromId
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.OPS_ImpdataForManu
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.OPS_ImpdataForManu (ID, InvoiceNo, CaseNo, OrderNo, CustomerNo, ModelNo, Quantity, TransType, ImpDate, OptCode, ExpDesc, BarCode, Username, Opttime, OptRecord, PalletNo, Price, ext_orderno, ext_order_item, taxPrice, Amount, TaxAmount, TaxRate, FromId ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{transtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{impdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{optcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{expdesc,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{optrecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{palletno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{extOrderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extOrderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{fromid,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

update dbo.OPS_ImpdataForManu
ID = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
InvoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

where ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
